name: explore
description: Explore, understand, and improve a codebase as a read-only senior architect-advisor, driven by feature flags. Charts a durable system design reference (diagrams, ADRs, risk map) by default; flags add audit-and-plan (--improve), single-task planning (--plan-once), security review (--security), plan review (--review), executor dispatch (--execute-level), and budget-aware resumable runs (--sub-continuous) — tunable with --depth, --verbosity, --caveman, and --model.
